notes: Observer wards are drawn from 7.41 shadowcast visibility cells when occlusion data is present.
Sentry wards are drawn as unobstructed true sight rings; only observer wards use occlusion.
Occluded observer vision uses map_data_741.png elevation, tree, and FOW blocker data.
Rendering uses map_data grid/world coordinates projected to the 7.41 overview map bounds, then applies the terrain calibration x=13 y=-16 scale=1.0655.
